document.contractPreview:
Agreement prepared for Business Website Development.

Parties

Service ProviderACAT Digital Services
ClientNoura
noura.client@example.com

This service agreement is entered into by the parties listed above for the project described below. It is intended as a practical MVP contract draft for demo and review purposes.

Project Scope

The freelancer will design and develop a responsive business website for the client. The website will include a homepage, services page, about page, contact page, and basic content sections. The project includes layout design, frontend implementation, basic backend setup if needed, and final testing.

Deliverables

1. Responsive website design 2. Homepage, About, Services, and Contact pages 3. Contact form setup 4. Basic SEO structure 5. Final tested website files 6. One round of minor revisions

Timeline

The provider will use commercially reasonable efforts to complete the project by 2026-05-24, subject to timely feedback, approvals, and materials from the client.

Fees and Payment Terms

The total project fee is JOD 980.

50% of the total amount is due before starting the project, and the remaining 50% is due upon final delivery and client approval.

Milestones

MilestoneTarget date
1. Requirements confirmation2026-05-01 2. Initial design draft

Review and Changes

Work outside the agreed scope, additional revision rounds, or material changes to approved deliverables should be confirmed in writing before the provider begins that additional work.

Additional Notes

1. Requirements confirmation: 2026-05-01 2. Initial design draft: 2026-05-08 3. Website development: 2026-05-15 4. Final review and revisions: 2026-05-21 5. Final delivery: 2026-05-24

Signatures

ACAT Digital Services
Signature / Date
Noura
Signature / Date
document.invoicePreview:
Invoice NumberINV-182835
Issue DateApr 30, 2026
FromACAT Digital Services
Bill ToNoura
noura.client@example.com

Payment Request

Description Terms Amount
Business Website Development 50% of the total amount is due before starting the project, and the remaining 50% is due upon final delivery and client approval. JOD 980

Total Due: JOD 980

Notes

This invoice is a payment request for the project above. A receipt should be issued only after payment has been received or marked as paid.
